Product Pricing Docs Blog

Pricing plans for teams of all sizes

Simple, transparent pricing that grows with you.

Starter

$9 /month

For individuals and small teams just getting started with project management.

Get Started
  • 5 projects
  • 10 GB storage
  • Basic analytics
  • Email support

Professional

$29 /month

For growing teams that need advanced features and priority support.

Get Started
  • Unlimited projects
  • 100 GB storage
  • Advanced analytics
  • Priority support
  • API access

Enterprise

$79 /month

For organizations needing custom solutions, SSO, and dedicated support.

Contact Sales
  • Unlimited everything
  • 1 TB storage
  • Custom dashboards
  • SSO / SAML
  • Dedicated account manager
  • SLA guarantee

Frequently asked questions

Can I switch plans at any time?

Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.

Is there a free trial?

All paid plans include a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfers for annual plans.
